channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Some parents don’t want their kids to use tech at school. But districts are pushing back
item.description: Parents across the country who are worried about excessive screen time in schools are lobbying educators to go back to pencils and paper.

item.title: Denver runway fatality reveals a weakness in airport security
Prosecutors to retry Alex Murdaugh in deaths of wife and son after high court overturned convictions
